title: coleus calaminthoides
intro: Coleus calaminthoides is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the blue coleus or coleus. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is rich in essential oils and flavonoids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, contributing to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Coleus calaminthoides include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
